an10.11:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, when a bhikkhu who possesses five factors resorts to and uses a lodging that possesses five factors, in no long time, with the destruction of the taints, he might realize for himself with direct knowledge, in this very life, the taintless liberation of mind, liberation by wisdom, and having entered upon it, dwell in it.
an10.11:1.2:
2
"And how, bhikkhus, does a bhikkhu possess five factors?
an10.11:1.3: (1) "Here, a bhikkhu is endowed with faith. He has faith in the enlightenment of the Tathāgata thus: ‘The Blessed One is an arahant, perfectly enlightened, accomplished in true knowledge and conduct, fortunate, knower of the world, unsurpassed trainer of persons to be tamed, teacher of devas and humans, the Enlightened One, the Blessed One.’
an10.11:1.4: (2) "He is seldom ill or afflicted, possessing an even digestion that is neither too cool nor too hot but moderate and suitable for striving.
an10.11:2.1:
3
"And how does a lodging possess five factors?
an10.11:2.2:
(6) "Here, the lodging is neither too far
nor too close, and it possesses a means for going and returning.
an10.11:3.1: "It is in this way that a lodging possesses five factors.
an10.11:3.2: "When a bhikkhu who possesses these five factors resorts to and uses a lodging that possesses these five factors, in no long time, with the destruction of the taints, he might realize for himself with direct knowledge, in this very life, the taintless liberation of mind, liberation by wisdom, and having entered upon it, dwell in it."
